cro_observations.observation: Homepage has no embedded lead-capture form above the fold; visitors must click through to a separate contact page to enquire
cro_observations.impact: Extra clicks to enquire lose leads.

cro_observations.observation: Weak / buried primary call-to-action — the main CTA appears only mid-page and uses vague wording ('Contact Us Now') with no single, repeated, action-led button (e.g. 'Book a Meeting')
cro_observations.impact: Unclear CTA loses clicks and leads.

cro_observations.observation: Trust signals largely absent above the fold — no client testimonials, no credentials (CFP/CFA), no review badges, no quantified proof (years in business, clients served, AUM)
cro_observations.impact: No trust cues, so visitors don't convert.

cro_observations.observation: Generic, undifferentiated hero value proposition ('personalized planning', 'trusted advisor') with no clear positioning statement
cro_observations.impact: Doesn't say why to choose this firm.

cro_observations.observation: No social proof or media/credential strip (client logos, 'as seen in', segment validation) and no gated lead magnet (guide, calculator, checklist)
cro_observations.impact: No proof to build credibility or capture leads.
